settings.heading:
The two people
behind the bench.
settings.deck: Chemistrie is not a brand that hired a chemist. It is two compounding pharmacists who could not stop formulating for the people they love.
settings.deck2: Before there was a logo, there was a bench in Houston and a short list of requests — a retinol that did not burn, a vitamin C that did not oxidise in a week. The founders answered them one bottle at a time. This page is simply who they are.

settings.heading:
Read the
whole story.
settings.sub: Now that you know the pharmacists, see where the house began — or go straight to the collection.
